sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ رَاعٍ اسْمُهُ سُلَيْمَانُ تَحْتَ شَجَرَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pastir po imenu Sulejman je sjedio ispod velikog stabla.
sentences.translationEn: A shepherd named Suleyman sat under a big tree.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّقْسُ حَارًّا وَغَنَمُهُ تَأْكُلُ الْعُشْبَ بِهُدُوءٍ.
sentences.translation: Bilo je vruće i ovce su mirno jele travu.
sentences.translationEn: The weather was hot and his sheep were quietly eating grass.

sentences.arabic: رَأَى طِفْلًا يَبْكِي عَلَى الطَّرِيقِ فَقَامَ إِلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: Vidio je dijete kako plače na putu pa je krenuo prema njemu.
sentences.translationEn: He saw a child crying on the road and went to him.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهُ مَاءً وَطَعَامًا وَأَرْشَدَهُ إِلَى الْقَرْيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dao mu je vodu i hranu i uputio ga prema selu.
sentences.translationEn: He gave him water and food and directed him to the village.
